executives.name: Kerry Clark
executives.background: Retired Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Cardinal Health, Inc. Former Vice Chairman of the Board of The Procter & Gamble Company.

executives.name: Maria Sastre
executives.background: Former President and Chief Operating Officer of Signature Flight Support. Former Vice President, International Sales and Marketing of Royal Caribbean Cruises.

executives.name: Roger Ferguson, Jr.
executives.background: Roger W. Ferguson, Jr. has been a director since 2016. He was the President and CEO of TIAA from 2008 to 2021 and served as Vice Chairman of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.
